summary: FIXO backend + frontend tested end-to-end. 21/21 backend pytest tests PASS (services, OTP auth + rate limit + 5-attempt 429, role mismatch reject, bookings flow with AI auto-assign, 85% technician earnings credit, referral signup ₹50 credit, referrer reward paid once only, technician availability/location/earnings, WebSocket initial status + broadcast). Frontend mobile flow verified: login (role toggle + email) → request OTP → verify screen auto-fills OTP from dev_otp query param (one digit per cell, 6 cells) → routes to /home for customer. Home shows all 8 services, search, banner, Refer & Earn CTA with code, bottom tab bar (Home/Bookings/Wallet/Profile). Deprecated style warnings detected in console: shadow* props and pointerEvents prop.

issues: Console deprecation warnings: 'shadow*' style props are deprecated — use 'boxShadow' (RN Web). props.pointerEvents is deprecated — use style.pointerEvents. Not blocking but should be cleaned up across stylesheets/components.

action_items: Optional: replace shadow* style keys with boxShadow and move pointerEvents from props into style to silence React Native Web deprecation warnings.
Optional: expo SDK suggests updating expo@54.0.34→54.0.35, expo-font@14.0.11→14.0.12, expo-router@6.0.23→6.0.24 (minor patch alignment).
critical_code_review_comments: AI matcher ranks by score (skill_match*100 - dist*2 + rating*5). Multiple online techs at the same lat/lng yield ties; backend picks first. Acceptable for MVP.

test_credentials.md references sample accounts customer1@test.com / tech1@test.com but '.test' TLD is rejected by EmailStr (special-use). If main agent wants pre-seed, use a real TLD (fixotest.com) — tests already use this pattern.
Booking total can go negative if wallet credit > price - discount; current code uses max(0.0,...) so it's safe.
seed_data_creation: Each test creates fresh users with prefix test_<role>_<uuid8>@fixotest.com. No global seed data added beyond existing 8 services (auto-seeded on backend startup).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Use EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL from /app/frontend/.env. Pytest cmd: EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL=<url> pytest /app/backend/tests/test_fixo_backend.py -v. Avoid '.test' TLD with EmailStr — use 'fixotest.com'. For deterministic AI auto-assign in tests, set technician+booking to random remote coords (e.g., lat=uniform(-60,-10), lng=uniform(-170,-100)) so existing online techs don't win. OTP verify screen renders 6 individual cells (one digit each) populated from ?dev_otp=XXXXXX url param. Frontend customer route is /home (not /(customer)/home as in some docs).
